description: In repl_core_machine ordered-link mode, ActorWrapper uses StateWrapper with private wrapped_state, so we can't apply node-level invariants. Consider adding a local adapter or upstream accessor to expose the inner state (or expand history-based checks) so ordered-link runs the full property suite.
title: Ordered-link repl model can't inspect wrapped state

acceptance_criteria:
Acceptance
- There is no mutation path that can add a DAG edge without a DepAddKey/NoCycleProof.
- Compiler forces add paths to handle Acyclic vs Free keys explicitly.
- Tests cover: cycle detection for Blocks/Parent; Related/DiscoveredFrom bypass DAG checks but still validated.
- Existing behavior preserved for valid inputs.
description:
Problem
- plan_add_dep builds raw DepKey + ad-hoc check_no_cycle, then emits WireDepAddV1.
- The NoCycleProof/DepAddKey types exist but aren't used here, so the compiler can't enforce that DAG checks happened.
- A future refactor can bypass the cycle check without the type system noticing.

Impact
- Cycle invariants for Blocks/Parent depend on discipline instead of types.
- Violates parse-don't-validate and "types should tell the truth".
design:
Design
- Make MutationEngine add deps through DepAddKey only:
  - Use state.check_dep_add_key(key) to return DepAddKey (Acyclic|Free).
  - Change WireDepAddV1 (or an internal wrapper) to carry DepAddKey, or make the add path require a DepAddKey parameter.
- Option A: introduce a ValidatedDepAdd type in core (mirrors ValidatedBeadPatch) that only constructs from DepAddKey; mutation_engine must build that.
- Option B: split add ops in mutation engine: add_dep_acyclic requires NoCycleProof, add_dep_free does not; prohibit raw DepKey in the API.
- Ensure all dependency adds (including create's dependency list and SetParent path) go through the same typed gate.

Scatter fit
- One entry point (check_dep_add_key) owns DAG validity; call sites no longer repeat or forget checks.

Files
- crates/beads-rs/src/daemon/mutation_engine.rs
- crates/beads-core/src/dep.rs
- crates/beads-core/src/state.rs
- crates/beads-core/src/event.rs (if adding ValidatedDepAdd)
title: mutation: dep adds must carry DAG proof types
